name: ielts-writing-7-diagnostic-lab
description: Sale-readiness release of the evidence-based IELTS Writing diagnostic with canonical analysis and scoring.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check script.js && node --check wordCount.js && node --check netlify/functions/api.js && node --check services/apiRouter.js && node --check services/storage.js && node --check services/analysisJobStore.js && node --check services/diagnosticReset.js && node --check services/aiAnalyzer.js && node --check services/task2Safety.js && node --check services/canonicalAnalysis.js && node --check services/diagnosticResponseSchema.js && node --check services/kruPomRubricReference.js && node --check services/promptBuilder.js && node --check scripts/reset-diagnostic-data.mjs && node --check tests/v7-production-calibration.test.mjs && node --check tests/v8-sale-readiness.test.mjs
scripts.test: node tests/diagnostic-api.test.mjs && node tests/v7-production-calibration.test.mjs && node tests/v8-sale-readiness.test.mjs
